title: Kalshi WebSocket API
description: Complete WebSocket API for the Kalshi exchange, covering all 13 documentation sections.

auth.description: API key authentication required for WebSocket connections. The API key should be provided during the WebSocket handshake.

websocket_connection.title: WebSocket Connection
websocket_connection.description: Main WebSocket connection endpoint. All communication happens through this single connection. Authentication is required to establish the connection.

send.title: Subscribe Command
send.description: Subscribe to one or more channels

properties.name: id
properties.description: Unique ID of the command request. Generated by the client and should be unique within a WS session. Start from 1 and increment for every new command. If the id is set to 0, the server treats it the same way as if there was no id.

properties.name: cmd
properties.description: subscribe (constant)

properties.name: channels
properties.description: List of channels to subscribe to. Items must be one of the valid channel names.

properties.name: market_ticker
properties.description: Subscribe to a single market. Example: "KXBTCD-25AUG0517-T114999.99" (mutually exclusive with market_tickers)

properties.name: market_tickers
properties.description: Subscribe to multiple markets (mutually exclusive with market_ticker)

properties.name: market_id
properties.description: Subscribe to a single market by UUID (mutually exclusive with market_ids and market_ticker(s))

properties.name: market_ids
properties.description: Subscribe to multiple markets by UUID (mutually exclusive with market_id and market_ticker(s))

properties.name: send_initial_snapshot
properties.description: If true, receive an initial snapshot for requested market tickers on the ticker channel

properties.name: skip_ticker_ack
properties.description: If true, OK responses omit the market_tickers/market_ids lists for this subscription

properties.name: shard_factor
properties.description: Number of shards for communications channel fanout (optional)

properties.name: shard_key
properties.description: Shard key for communications channel fanout (requires shard_factor)

properties.name: id
properties.description: Unique ID of the command request. Generated by the client and should be unique within a WS session. Start from 1 and increment for every new command. If the id is set to 0, the server treats it the same way as if there was no id.

properties.name: cmd
properties.description: unsubscribe (constant)

properties.name: sids
properties.description: List of subscription IDs to cancel

properties.name: id
properties.description: Unique ID of the command request. Generated by the client and should be unique within a WS session. Start from 1 and increment for every new command. If the id is set to 0, the server treats it the same way as if there was no id.

properties.name: cmd
properties.description: list_subscriptions (constant)

send.title: Update Subscription - Add Markets
send.description: Add markets to an existing subscription

properties.name: id
properties.description: Unique ID of the command request. Generated by the client and should be unique within a WS session. Start from 1 and increment for every new command. If the id is set to 0, the server treats it the same way as if there was no id.

properties.name: cmd
properties.description: update_subscription (constant)

properties.name: sid
properties.description: Server-generated subscription identifier (sid) used to identify the channel

properties.name: sids
properties.description: Array containing exactly one subscription ID (alternative to sid). Either sid or sids must be provided, not both.

properties.name: market_ticker
properties.description: Add/remove a single market

properties.name: market_tickers
properties.description: Add/remove multiple markets

properties.name: market_id
properties.description: Add/remove a single market by UUID

properties.name: market_ids
properties.description: Add/remove multiple markets by UUID

properties.name: send_initial_snapshot
properties.description: If true, receive an initial snapshot for newly added market tickers on the ticker channel

properties.name: action
properties.description: Action to take

send.title: Update Subscription - Delete Markets
send.description: Remove markets from an existing subscription. Same shape as Add Markets but action is 'delete_markets'.

send.title: Update Subscription - Single SID Format
send.description: Update subscription using sid parameter instead of sids array

receive.title: Subscribed Response
receive.description: Confirmation that subscription was successful

properties.name: id
properties.description: Unique ID of the command request. Generated by the client and should be unique within a WS session. Start from 1 and increment for every new command. If the id is set to 0, the server treats it the same way as if there was no id.

properties.name: type
properties.description: subscribed (constant)

properties.name: channel
properties.description: Channel name

properties.name: sid
properties.description: Server-generated subscription identifier (sid) used to identify the channel

receive.title: Unsubscribed Response
receive.description: Confirmation that unsubscription was successful

properties.name: id
properties.description: Unique ID of the command request. Generated by the client and should be unique within a WS session. Start from 1 and increment for every new command. If the id is set to 0, the server treats it the same way as if there was no id.

properties.name: sid
properties.description: Server-generated subscription identifier (sid) used to identify the channel

properties.name: seq
properties.description: Sequential number that should be checked if you want to guarantee you received all the messages. Used for snapshot/delta consistency

properties.name: type
properties.description: unsubscribed (constant)

receive.title: OK Response
receive.description: Successful update operation response

properties.name: id
properties.description: Unique ID of the command request. Generated by the client and should be unique within a WS session. Start from 1 and increment for every new command. If the id is set to 0, the server treats it the same way as if there was no id.

properties.name: sid
properties.description: Server-generated subscription identifier (sid) used to identify the channel

properties.name: seq
properties.description: Sequential number that should be checked if you want to guarantee you received all the messages. Used for snapshot/delta consistency

properties.name: type
properties.description: ok (constant)

properties.name: market_tickers
properties.description: Full list of market tickers after update

properties.name: market_ids
properties.description: Full list of market IDs after update

receive.title: List Subscriptions Response
receive.description: Response containing all active subscriptions

properties.name: id
properties.description: Unique ID of the command request. Generated by the client and should be unique within a WS session. Start from 1 and increment for every new command. If the id is set to 0, the server treats it the same way as if there was no id.

properties.name: type
properties.description: ok (constant)

properties.name: msg
properties.description: List of active subscriptions; each item is {channel, sid}

receive.title: Error Response
receive.description: Error response for failed operations

properties.name: id
properties.description: Unique ID of the command request. Generated by the client and should be unique within a WS session. Start from 1 and increment for every new command. If the id is set to 0, the server treats it the same way as if there was no id.

properties.name: type
properties.description: error (constant)

properties.name: code
properties.description: Error code (1-22). See error_codes table.

properties.name: msg
properties.description: Human-readable error message

properties.name: market_id
properties.description: Market UUID if error is market-specific (optional)

properties.name: market_ticker
properties.description: Market ticker if error is market-specific (optional)

error_codes.name: Exactly one subscription ID is required
Command timeout
error_codes.description: Server timed out while processing command

error_codes.name: shard_factor is required when shard_key is set
error_codes.description: Missing shard_factor when shard_key is set

connection_keep_alive.title: Connection Keep-Alive
connection_keep_alive.description: WebSocket control frames for connection management. Kalshi sends Ping frames (0x9) every 10 seconds with body 'heartbeat'. Clients should respond with Pong frames (0xA). Clients may also send Ping frames to which Kalshi will respond with Pong.

send.title: Ping
send.description: Client sends Ping frame (0x9) to elicit Pong from Kalshi

properties.name: payload
properties.description: Empty body

send.title: Pong
send.description: Client replies to Ping with Pong Frame (0xA)

properties.name: payload
properties.description: Empty body

receive.title: Ping
receive.description: Kalshi sends Ping (0x9) with body 'heartbeat' to elicit Pong from client

properties.name: payload
properties.description: Body is the literal string 'heartbeat'

receive.title: Pong
receive.description: Kalshi responds to client Ping with Pong frame (0xA)

properties.name: payload
properties.description: Empty body

orderbook_delta.title: Orderbook Updates
orderbook_delta.description: Real-time orderbook price level changes. Provides incremental updates to maintain a live orderbook.
requirements: Authentication required
Market specification required (market_ticker or market_tickers; market_id/market_ids not supported)
Sends orderbook_snapshot first, then incremental orderbook_delta updates
orderbook_delta.use_case: Building and maintaining a real-time orderbook

receive.title: Orderbook Snapshot
receive.description: Complete view of the order book's aggregated price levels

properties.name: type
properties.description: orderbook_snapshot (constant)

properties.name: sid
properties.description: Server-generated subscription identifier (sid) used to identify the channel

properties.name: seq
properties.description: Sequential number that should be checked if you want to guarantee you received all the messages. Used for snapshot/delta consistency

properties.name: market_ticker
properties.description: Unique market identifier

properties.name: market_id
properties.description: Unique market UUID

properties.name: yes_dollars_fp
properties.description: Optional. Price levels for YES side as [price_in_dollars, contract_count_fp]. Key absent if no YES offers.

properties.name: no_dollars_fp
properties.description: Optional. Same format as yes_dollars_fp but for the NO side. Key absent if no NO offers.

receive.title: Orderbook Delta
receive.description: Update to be applied to the current order book view

properties.name: type
properties.description: orderbook_delta (constant)

properties.name: sid
properties.description: Server-generated subscription identifier (sid) used to identify the channel

properties.name: seq
properties.description: Sequential number that should be checked if you want to guarantee you received all the messages. Used for snapshot/delta consistency

properties.name: market_ticker
properties.description: Unique market identifier

properties.name: market_id
properties.description: Unique market UUID

properties.name: price_dollars
properties.description: Price level in dollars

properties.name: delta_fp
properties.description: Fixed-point contract delta (2 decimals)

properties.name: side
properties.description: Market side

properties.name: client_order_id
properties.description: Optional. Present only when you caused this orderbook change. Contains the client_order_id of your order that triggered this delta.

properties.name: subaccount
properties.description: Optional. Present only when you caused this orderbook change and are using subaccounts.

properties.name: ts
properties.description: Deprecated. Optional RFC3339 timestamp. Use ts_ms instead.

properties.name: ts_ms
properties.description: Optional. Unix timestamp in milliseconds

ticker.title: Market Ticker
ticker.description: Market price, volume, and open interest updates.
requirements: No additional channel-level authentication beyond the authenticated WebSocket connection
Market specification optional (omit to receive all markets)
Supports market_ticker/market_tickers and market_id/market_ids
Updates sent whenever any ticker field changes
ticker.use_case: Displaying current market prices and statistics

receive.title: Ticker Update
receive.description: Market price ticker information

properties.name: type
properties.description: ticker (constant)

properties.name: sid
properties.description: Server-generated subscription identifier (sid) used to identify the channel

properties.name: market_ticker
properties.description: Unique market identifier

properties.name: market_id
properties.description: Unique market UUID

properties.name: price_dollars
properties.description: Last traded price in dollars

properties.name: yes_bid_dollars
properties.description: Best bid price for yes side in dollars

properties.name: yes_ask_dollars
properties.description: Best ask price for yes side in dollars

properties.name: yes_bid_size_fp
properties.description: Fixed-point contracts at best bid (2 decimals)

properties.name: yes_ask_size_fp
properties.description: Fixed-point contracts at best ask (2 decimals)

properties.name: last_trade_size_fp
properties.description: Fixed-point contracts in last trade (2 decimals)

properties.name: volume_fp
properties.description: Fixed-point total contracts traded (2 decimals)

properties.name: open_interest_fp
properties.description: Fixed-point open interest (2 decimals)

properties.name: dollar_volume
properties.description: Number of dollars traded in the market so far

properties.name: dollar_open_interest
properties.description: Number of dollars positioned in the market currently

properties.name: ts
properties.description: Deprecated. Unix timestamp in seconds. Use ts_ms instead.

properties.name: ts_ms
properties.description: Unix timestamp in milliseconds

properties.name: time
properties.description: Deprecated. RFC3339 timestamp. Use ts_ms instead.

trade.title: Public Trades
trade.description: Public trade notifications when trades occur.
requirements: No additional channel-level authentication beyond the authenticated WebSocket connection
Market specification optional (omit to receive all trades)
Updates sent immediately after trade execution

receive.title: Trade Update
receive.description: Public trade information

properties.name: type
properties.description: trade (constant)

properties.name: sid
properties.description: Server-generated subscription identifier (sid) used to identify the channel

properties.name: trade_id
properties.description: Unique identifier for the trade (UUID)

properties.name: market_ticker
properties.description: Unique market identifier

properties.name: yes_price_dollars
properties.description: Yes side price in dollars

properties.name: no_price_dollars
properties.description: No side price in dollars

properties.name: count_fp
properties.description: Fixed-point contracts traded (2 decimals)

properties.name: taker_side
properties.description: Market side

properties.name: ts
properties.description: Deprecated. Unix timestamp in seconds. Use ts_ms instead.

properties.name: ts_ms
properties.description: Unix timestamp in milliseconds

fill.title: User Fills
fill.description: Your order fill notifications. Requires authentication.
requirements: Authentication required
Market specification optional via market_ticker/market_tickers (omit to receive all your fills)
Supports update_subscription with add_markets / delete_markets
Updates sent immediately when your orders are filled

receive.title: Fill Update
receive.description: Private fill information for authenticated user

properties.name: type
properties.description: fill (constant)

properties.name: sid
properties.description: Server-generated subscription identifier (sid) used to identify the channel

properties.name: trade_id
properties.description: Unique identifier for fills. Differentiates fills.

properties.name: order_id
properties.description: Unique identifier for orders. Differentiates fills for different orders.

properties.name: market_ticker
properties.description: Unique market identifier

properties.name: is_taker
properties.description: Whether you were a taker on this fill

properties.name: side
properties.description: Market side

properties.name: yes_price_dollars
properties.description: Price for the yes side of the fill in dollars

properties.name: count_fp
properties.description: Fixed-point contracts filled (2 decimals)

properties.name: fee_cost
properties.description: Exchange fee paid for this fill in fixed-point dollars

properties.name: action
properties.description: Order action type

properties.name: ts
properties.description: Deprecated. Unix timestamp in seconds. Use ts_ms instead.

properties.name: ts_ms
properties.description: Unix timestamp in milliseconds

properties.name: client_order_id
properties.description: Optional client-provided order ID

properties.name: post_position_fp
properties.description: Fixed-point position after the fill (2 decimals)

properties.name: purchased_side
properties.description: Market side

properties.name: subaccount
properties.description: Optional subaccount number for the fill

market_positions.title: Market Positions
market_positions.description: Real-time updates of your positions in markets. Requires authentication.
requirements: Authentication required
Market specification optional (omit to receive all positions)
Filters are by market_ticker/market_tickers only; market_id/market_ids are not supported
Updates sent when your position changes due to trades, settlements, etc.
market_positions.monetary_values: All monetary values are returned as fixed-point dollar strings (_dollars suffix).
market_positions.use_case: Portfolio tracking, position monitoring, P&L calculations

receive.title: Market Position Update
receive.description: Real-time position updates for authenticated user

properties.name: type
properties.description: market_position (constant)

properties.name: sid
properties.description: Server-generated subscription identifier (sid) used to identify the channel

properties.name: user_id
properties.description: User ID for the position

properties.name: market_ticker
properties.description: Unique market identifier

properties.name: position_fp
properties.description: Fixed-point net position (2 decimals)

properties.name: position_cost_dollars
properties.description: Current cost basis of the position as a fixed-point dollar string

properties.name: realized_pnl_dollars
properties.description: Realized profit/loss as a fixed-point dollar string

properties.name: fees_paid_dollars
properties.description: Total fees paid as a fixed-point dollar string

properties.name: position_fee_cost_dollars
properties.description: Total position fee cost as a fixed-point dollar string

properties.name: volume_fp
properties.description: Fixed-point total volume traded (2 decimals)

properties.name: subaccount
properties.description: Optional subaccount number for the position

market_lifecycle_v2.title: Market & Event Lifecycle
market_lifecycle_v2.description: Market state changes and event creation notifications.
requirements: No additional channel-level authentication beyond the authenticated WebSocket connection
Receives all market and event lifecycle notifications (market_ticker filters not supported)
Event creation notifications included
market_lifecycle_v2.use_case: Tracking market lifecycle including creation, (de)activation, close date changes, determination, settlement, fractional trading updates, and price level structure changes

receive.title: Market Lifecycle V2
receive.description: Market lifecycle events

properties.name: type
properties.description: market_lifecycle_v2 (constant)

properties.name: sid
properties.description: Server-generated subscription identifier (sid) used to identify the channel

properties.name: event_type
properties.description: Lifecycle event type

properties.name: market_ticker
properties.description: Unique market identifier

properties.name: open_ts
properties.description: Optional. Only on 'created'. Unix timestamp (seconds) when the market opened.

properties.name: close_ts
properties.description: Optional. Only on 'created' or 'close_date_updated'. Unix timestamp (seconds) for scheduled close.

properties.name: result
properties.description: Optional. Only on 'determined'. Result of the market.

properties.name: determination_ts
properties.description: Optional. Only on 'determined'. Unix timestamp (seconds) when determined.

properties.name: settlement_value
properties.description: Optional. Only on 'determined'. Settlement value in fixed-point dollars (e.g. '0.5000').

properties.name: settled_ts
properties.description: Optional. Only on 'settled'. Unix timestamp (seconds) when settled.

properties.name: is_deactivated
properties.description: Optional. Only on pause/unpause of an open market.

properties.name: price_level_structure
properties.description: Optional. Present on 'created' or 'price_level_structure_updated'.

properties.name: additional_metadata
properties.description: Optional. Only emitted on 'created'.

additional_metadata.name: S&P 500 daily return on Sep 14
additional_metadata.title: S&P 500 closes up by 0.02% or more
additional_metadata.rules_primary: The S&P 500 index level at 4:00 PM ET...

receive.title: Event Lifecycle
receive.description: Event creation notification

properties.name: type
properties.description: event_lifecycle (constant)

properties.name: sid
properties.description: Server-generated subscription identifier (sid) used to identify the channel

properties.name: event_ticker
properties.description: Unique identifier for the event being created

properties.name: title
properties.description: Title of event

properties.name: subtitle
properties.description: Subtitle of event

properties.name: collateral_return_type
properties.description: MECNET, DIRECNET, or empty if no collateral return scheme

properties.name: series_ticker
properties.description: Series ticker for the event

properties.name: strike_date
properties.description: Optional. Unix timestamp for strike date if any.

properties.name: strike_period
properties.description: Optional. Strike period of the event if any.

msg.title: What will 1+1 equal on Jan 25 at 21:50?
msg.subtitle: Jan 25 at 21:50

multivariate_market_lifecycle.title: Multivariate Market & Event Lifecycle
multivariate_market_lifecycle.description: Multivariate event (MVE) market state changes and event creation notifications.
requirements: No additional channel-level authentication beyond the authenticated WebSocket connection
Receives all multivariate market lifecycle notifications (market_ticker filters not supported)
Only emits lifecycle updates for multivariate events
Event creation notifications included
multivariate_market_lifecycle.use_case: Tracking multivariate market lifecycle including creation, (de)activation, close date changes, determination, settlement

receive.title: Multivariate Market Lifecycle
receive.description: Multivariate market lifecycle events. Same shape as market_lifecycle_v2 but type is 'multivariate_market_lifecycle'.

properties.name: type
properties.description: multivariate_market_lifecycle (constant)

properties.name: sid
properties.description: Server-generated subscription identifier (sid) used to identify the channel

properties.name: event_type
properties.description: Lifecycle event type

properties.name: market_ticker
properties.description: Unique market identifier

properties.name: open_ts
properties.description: Optional. Only on 'created'. Unix timestamp (seconds) when the market opened.

properties.name: close_ts
properties.description: Optional. Only on 'created' or 'close_date_updated'. Unix timestamp (seconds) for scheduled close.

properties.name: result
properties.description: Optional. Only on 'determined'. Result of the market.

properties.name: determination_ts
properties.description: Optional. Only on 'determined'. Unix timestamp (seconds) when determined.

properties.name: settlement_value
properties.description: Optional. Only on 'determined'. Settlement value in fixed-point dollars (e.g. '0.5000').

properties.name: settled_ts
properties.description: Optional. Only on 'settled'. Unix timestamp (seconds) when settled.

properties.name: is_deactivated
properties.description: Optional. Only on pause/unpause of an open market.

properties.name: price_level_structure
properties.description: Optional. Present on 'created' or 'price_level_structure_updated'.

properties.name: additional_metadata
properties.description: Optional. Only emitted on 'created'.

receive.title: Event Lifecycle (Multivariate)
receive.description: Multivariate event creation notification. Same shape as the standard event_lifecycle.

properties.name: type
properties.description: event_lifecycle (constant)

properties.name: sid
properties.description: Server-generated subscription identifier (sid) used to identify the channel

properties.name: event_ticker
properties.description: Unique identifier for the event being created

properties.name: title
properties.description: Title of event

properties.name: subtitle
properties.description: Subtitle of event

properties.name: collateral_return_type
properties.description: MECNET, DIRECNET, or empty if no collateral return scheme

properties.name: series_ticker
properties.description: Series ticker for the event

properties.name: strike_date
properties.description: Optional. Unix timestamp for strike date if any.

properties.name: strike_period
properties.description: Optional. Strike period of the event if any.

msg.title: What will 1+1 equal on Jan 25 at 21:50?
msg.subtitle: Jan 25 at 21:50

multivariate.title: Multivariate Lookups (Deprecated)
multivariate.description: DEPRECATED: this channel predates RFQs and should not be used for new integrations. Multivariate collection lookup notifications.
requirements: No additional channel-level authentication beyond the authenticated WebSocket connection
No filtering parameters; subscription is global
multivariate.use_case: Tracking multivariate lookup interest for legacy integrations

receive.title: Multivariate Lookup (Deprecated)
receive.description: Deprecated multivariate collection lookup notification

properties.name: type
properties.description: multivariate_lookup (constant)

properties.name: sid
properties.description: Server-generated subscription identifier (sid) used to identify the channel

properties.name: selected_markets
properties.description: Array of {event_ticker, market_ticker, side}

communications.title: Communications
communications.description: Real-time Request for Quote (RFQ) and quote notifications. Requires authentication.
requirements: Authentication required
Market specification ignored
Optional sharding via shard_factor (1-100) and shard_key (0 <= key < shard_factor)
RFQ events (rfq_created, rfq_deleted) always sent
Quote events (quote_created, quote_accepted, quote_executed) only sent if you created the quote OR the RFQ
communications.use_case: Tracking RFQs you create and quotes on your RFQs, or quotes you create on others' RFQs. Use quote_executed to correlate fill messages with quotes via client_order_id.

receive.title: RFQ Created
receive.description: Notification when an RFQ is created

properties.name: type
properties.description: rfq_created (constant)

properties.name: sid
properties.description: Server-generated subscription identifier (sid) used to identify the channel

properties.name: id
properties.description: Unique identifier for the RFQ

properties.name: creator_id
properties.description: Public communications ID of the RFQ creator (anonymized). Currently empty for rfq_created events.

properties.name: market_ticker
properties.description: Market ticker for the RFQ

properties.name: event_ticker
properties.description: Event ticker (optional)

properties.name: contracts_fp
properties.description: Fixed-point contracts requested (2 decimals) (optional)

properties.name: target_cost_dollars
properties.description: Target cost in dollars (optional)

properties.name: created_ts
properties.description: Timestamp (RFC3339) when the RFQ was created

properties.name: mve_collection_ticker
properties.description: Multivariate event collection ticker (optional)

properties.name: mve_selected_legs
properties.description: Selected legs for multivariate events; each leg is {event_ticker, market_ticker, side, yes_settlement_value_dollars}

receive.description: Notification when an RFQ is deleted

properties.description: Unique identifier for the RFQ

properties.name: creator_id
properties.description: Public communications ID of the RFQ creator (anonymized)

properties.name: market_ticker

properties.name: event_ticker
properties.description: Event ticker (optional)

properties.name: contracts_fp

properties.name: target_cost_dollars

properties.name: deleted_ts

properties.name: sid

properties.description: Unique identifier for the quote

properties.name: rfq_id

properties.name: quote_creator_id

properties.name: market_ticker
properties.description: Market ticker for the quote

properties.name: event_ticker

properties.name: yes_bid_dollars
properties.description: Yes side bid price in dollars

properties.name: no_bid_dollars
properties.description: No side bid price in dollars

properties.name: yes_contracts_offered_fp
properties.description: Fixed-point yes contracts offered (2 decimals) (optional)

properties.name: no_contracts_offered_fp
properties.description: Fixed-point no contracts offered (2 decimals) (optional)

properties.name: rfq_target_cost_dollars
properties.description: Target cost from the RFQ in dollars (optional)

properties.name: created_ts
properties.description: Timestamp (RFC3339) when the quote was created

receive.title: Quote Accepted
receive.description: Notification when a quote is accepted

properties.name: type
properties.description: quote_accepted (constant)

properties.name: sid
properties.description: Server-generated subscription identifier (sid) used to identify the channel

properties.name: quote_id
properties.description: Unique identifier for the quote

properties.name: rfq_id
properties.description: Identifier of the RFQ this quote is for

properties.name: quote_creator_id
properties.description: Public communications ID of the quote creator (anonymized)

properties.name: market_ticker
properties.description: Market ticker for the quote

properties.name: event_ticker
properties.description: Event ticker (optional)

properties.name: yes_bid_dollars
properties.description: Yes side bid price in dollars

properties.name: no_bid_dollars
properties.description: No side bid price in dollars

properties.name: accepted_side
properties.description: Which side was accepted (optional)

properties.name: contracts_accepted_fp
properties.description: Fixed-point contracts accepted (2 decimals) (optional)

properties.name: yes_contracts_offered_fp
properties.description: Fixed-point yes contracts offered (2 decimals) (optional)

properties.name: rfq_target_cost_dollars
properties.description: Target cost from the RFQ in dollars (optional)

receive.title: Quote Executed
receive.description: Notification when a quote is executed and orders are placed. Use this to correlate fills via client_order_id.

properties.name: type
properties.description: quote_executed (constant)

properties.name: sid
properties.description: Server-generated subscription identifier (sid) used to identify the channel

properties.name: quote_id
properties.description: Unique identifier for the quote that was executed

properties.name: rfq_id
properties.description: Identifier of the RFQ this quote was for

properties.name: quote_creator_id
properties.description: Anonymized identifier for the quote creator

properties.name: rfq_creator_id
properties.description: Anonymized identifier for the RFQ creator

properties.name: order_id
properties.description: Your order ID resulting from the quote execution. Match with fill messages.

properties.name: client_order_id
properties.description: Your client order ID for the executed order. Correlate with fill messages.

properties.name: market_ticker
properties.description: Market ticker for the executed quote

properties.name: executed_ts
properties.description: Timestamp (RFC3339) when the quote was executed

order_group_updates.title: Order Group Updates
order_group_updates.description: Real-time order group lifecycle and limit updates. Requires authentication.
requirements: Authentication required
Market specification ignored
Updates sent when order groups are created, triggered, reset, deleted, or have limits updated
order_group_updates.use_case: Tracking order group lifecycle and limits

receive.title: Order Group Updates
receive.description: Order group lifecycle and limit updates for authenticated user

properties.name: type
properties.description: order_group_updates (constant)

properties.name: sid
properties.description: Server-generated subscription identifier (sid) used to identify the channel

properties.name: seq
properties.description: Sequential number that should be checked if you want to guarantee you received all the messages. Used for snapshot/delta consistency

properties.name: event_type
properties.description: Order group event type

properties.name: order_group_id
properties.description: Order group identifier

properties.name: contracts_limit_fp
properties.description: Updated contracts limit in fixed-point (2 decimals). Present for 'created' and 'limit_updated' only.

user_orders.title: User Orders
user_orders.description: Real-time order created and updated notifications. Requires authentication.
requirements: Authentication required
Market specification optional via market_tickers (omit to receive all orders)
Supports update_subscription with add_markets / delete_markets actions
Updates sent when your orders are created, filled, canceled, or otherwise updated
user_orders.use_case: Tracking your resting orders, fills, and cancellations in real time

receive.title: User Order Update
receive.description: Real-time order updates for authenticated user

properties.name: type
properties.description: user_order (constant)

properties.name: sid
properties.description: Server-generated subscription identifier (sid) used to identify the channel

properties.name: order_id
properties.description: Unique order identifier (UUID)

properties.name: user_id
properties.description: User identifier (UUID)

properties.name: ticker
properties.description: Unique market identifier

properties.name: status
properties.description: Current order status

properties.name: side
properties.description: Market side

properties.name: is_yes
properties.description: Whether the order is on the yes side. Equivalent to side == "yes"

properties.name: yes_price_dollars
properties.description: Yes price in fixed-point dollars (4 decimals)

properties.name: fill_count_fp
properties.description: Number of contracts filled in fixed-point (2 decimals)

properties.name: remaining_count_fp
properties.description: Number of contracts remaining in fixed-point (2 decimals)

properties.name: initial_count_fp
properties.description: Initial number of contracts in fixed-point (2 decimals)

properties.name: taker_fill_cost_dollars
properties.description: Taker fill cost in fixed-point dollars (4 decimals)

properties.name: maker_fill_cost_dollars
properties.description: Maker fill cost in fixed-point dollars (4 decimals)

properties.name: taker_fees_dollars
properties.description: Taker fees in fixed-point dollars (4 decimals)

properties.name: maker_fees_dollars
properties.description: Maker fees in fixed-point dollars (4 decimals)

properties.name: client_order_id
properties.description: Client-provided order identifier

properties.name: order_group_id
properties.description: Order group identifier, if applicable

properties.name: self_trade_prevention_type
properties.description: Self-trade prevention type

properties.name: created_time
properties.description: Deprecated. RFC3339 creation time. Use created_ts_ms.

properties.name: created_ts_ms
properties.description: Order creation time as a Unix timestamp in milliseconds

properties.name: last_update_time
properties.description: Deprecated. RFC3339 last update time. Use last_updated_ts_ms.

properties.name: last_updated_ts_ms
properties.description: Last update time as a Unix timestamp in milliseconds

properties.name: expiration_time
properties.description: Deprecated. RFC3339 expiration time. Use expiration_ts_ms.

properties.name: expiration_ts_ms
properties.description: Order expiration time as a Unix timestamp in milliseconds

properties.name: subaccount_number
properties.description: Subaccount number (0 for primary, 1-32 for subaccounts)
